title: Friday
excerpt: A native desktop AI copilot for everyday tasks, with local credentials, bring-your-own providers, permissioned tools, voice, image generation, MCP tools, channels, and scheduled work.
content_html:
v1.0/macOS / Windows / Linux/Private beta

Your desktop AI copilot for everyday tasks. Chat in plain language and Friday can read and write files, search the web, generate images and video, transcribe your voice, speak back, run on a schedule, and connect to the tools you already use.

Download FridayGitHubRelease notes

Desktop beta for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

Desktop appRuns natively on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

Your AI providersConnect your own provider keys and choose the models.

Local by defaultSettings, credentials, history, and memory stay on your device.

You stay in controlFriday asks for approval before sensitive actions.

Friday

Friday

Friday

§ 01 — Features

A capable assistant,
running on your desktop.

01Chat

Chat that acts

Ask in plain language and Friday uses tools to finish the job — reads files, drafts documents, searches the web, runs commands, and generates images.

02Local first

Local and private

Friday is a desktop app. Your keys, settings, credentials, history, and files stay on your machine, not inside a website chatbot.

03Permissioned

Approval before action

Writing files, sending messages, and reaching outside services each need your explicit approval before Friday proceeds.

04Voice

Speak and listen

Dictate instead of typing, transcribe recordings, and have Friday read replies aloud in the voices you choose.

05Extensible

Skills and MCP

Teach Friday reusable workflows and expose new tools through the Model Context Protocol.

06Automation

Schedules and checks

Run recurring jobs, daily summaries, and health checks on a schedule, even when you are not actively chatting.

§ 02 — How it works

Ask naturally.
Approve real actions.

STEP 01

Ask

Make a request

Type or dictate what you want. Friday understands the goal, constraints, and expected output, then asks only when something critical is ambiguous.

STEP 02

Plan

Pick tools

It chooses the right files, commands, web search, browser, image generation, skill, MCP tool, subagent, or scheduled workflow for the task.

STEP 03

Act

Approve and verify

Sensitive actions pause for confirmation. Friday then checks the result and returns an answer, file, image, scheduled job, or other ready-to-use artifact.

Unlike a website chatbot, Friday runs on your machine and works through the providers, credentials, and permissions you choose.

Friday product brief

§ 03 — MCP

Extend Friday
with MCP servers.

Extension point

Remote MCP servers

Connect hosted tool servers over HTTP with optional token or key authentication, then make their tools available to the assistant.

Extension point

Local MCP servers

Run local stdio tool servers on your machine so domain-specific capabilities plug into Friday without changing the app.

Extension point

Any MCP client tool

Expose new capabilities to the assistant through the open Model Context Protocol, the single supported way to extend Friday's tool surface.

§ 04 — Channels

Chat with Friday
from anywhere.

Connect a Telegram bot and chat with Friday from your phone or desktop, with access controls and replies delivered to the same conversation.

Bundled bot channel for phone or desktop chat, with allowlists, DM policy, targets, and replies through the same chat.

Your chat

Friday

Same thread

  • Allowlist access
  • Direct-message policy
  • Same-thread replies

You decide who can reach Friday.

Each channel keeps its own credentials, enabled state, and access rules on your desktop.

§ 05 — Workflows

Generation and automation,
split by workflow.

Assistant

The core runtime that plans, asks for approval, uses tools, and returns concrete results.

Live

Assistant chat

Run agent turns from a clean Markdown chat, with visible tool activity, session history, and permission prompts for sensitive actions.

Generation

Separate media operators for voice, images, video, and audio so each capability can use its own provider and model.

Live

Voice generation

Dictate with speech-to-text and generate read-aloud replies through the voice provider and model you choose.

Live

Image generation

Create images from text descriptions in chat or the image workspace using the provider and model you select.

Live

Video generation

Generate video from text with the provider and model you choose. Results are playable and saved to your media library.

Live

Audio generation

Generate music and sound effects from text through the audio provider and model you select.

Automation

Background tools that run scheduled work and periodic checks without mixing them into media generation.

Live

Cron scheduler

Create, update, pause, resume, list, and run recurring assistant jobs with their own instructions, provider, and model.

Live

Health checks

Run periodic checklist-driven assistant checks and report back when something in your setup needs attention.

View all workflows
§ 06 — AI Providers

Bring your own AI.
Mix models by capability.

Docs that match the product.

StaticAstro content

Product

What Friday Is

Friday is a native desktop AI copilot that chats, acts with tools, and keeps control local.

Read docs

Product

Feature Overview

The main Friday capabilities: chat, tools, voice, image, video, and audio generation, scheduling, health checks, memory, and personalization.

Read docs

Providers

Providers

Friday is bring-your-own AI: add your own API keys and choose providers by capability.

Read docs

Extension

Skills And MCP

Extend Friday with reusable skills and Model Context Protocol servers.

Read docs

Channels

Channels

Talk to Friday from Telegram and Discord today, with additional channel adapters coming soon.

Read docs

Privacy

Privacy And Security

Friday is local-first, bring-your-own-key, and permissioned before sensitive actions.

Read docs
Browse all documentation

§ 07 · FAQ

Common questions.

What is Friday?

Friday is a native desktop AI copilot for everyday tasks. You chat with it in plain language and it can use tools to read and write files, search the web, generate images, transcribe voice, speak back, run scheduled work, and connect to external services.

Does Friday send my data anywhere?

Friday is local-first. Data leaves your machine only when a task requires an AI provider, channel, MCP server, web request, or hosted service you configured. Provider keys, credentials, settings, memory, and conversation history live locally.

Do I have to use one specific AI provider?

No. Friday is bring-your-own-AI. Add your own provider keys and choose the provider and model for the assistant, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, image generation, video generation, and audio generation. OpenAI-compatible endpoints can be configured too.

How does permissioning work?

Actions that write, delete, publish, send messages, access private data, or touch accounts require explicit approval. Friday shows a confirmation prompt before sensitive work proceeds.

Can Friday work from outside the app?

Yes. Connect a Telegram or Discord bot to talk to Friday from your phone or desktop, with per-channel access control, separate channel secrets, and replies delivered to the same conversation.

What can be automated?

Use the scheduler for recurring assistant jobs such as daily summaries, routine checks, cleanup tasks, and reminders. Health checks can run periodically against a checklist and report only when attention is needed.

Which desktop platforms are supported?

Friday is built with Electron for Windows, macOS on Intel and Apple Silicon, and Linux. The interface supports English and Italian, with light, dark, and system themes.

Is Friday certified for regulated data?

Friday does not currently claim a formal regulated-data certification. Review your own AI providers' and connected services' terms for how they handle data you send them.

sentences.en: Make it cozier: fireplace, bookshelves, warm light.

blocks.html_en: Rome in a heatwave — make it dramatic.

blocks.html_en: A winged horse rising through golden clouds.

blocks.html_en: Midday at the Colosseum — umbrellas up, plates full.

sentences.en: A capable assistant,running on your desktop.
sentences.zh: 一个得力的助手，在您的桌面上运行。
发挥作用的聊天

blocks.html_en: Ask in plain language and Friday uses tools to finish the job — reads files, drafts documents, searches the web, runs commands, and generates images.

sentences.en: Ask in plain language and Friday uses tools to finish the job — reads files, drafts documents, searches the web, runs commands, and generates images.
sentences.zh: 用简单的语言询问，星期五使用工具来完成工作——读取文件、起草文档、搜索网络、运行命令和生成图像。
02本地优先
本地和私人

blocks.html_en: Friday is a desktop app. Your keys, settings, credentials, history, and files stay on your machine, not inside a website chatbot.

sentences.zh: Friday 是一个桌面应用程序。

sentences.en: Your keys, settings, credentials, history, and files stay on your machine, not inside a website chatbot.
sentences.zh: 您的密钥、设置、凭据、历史记录和文件保留在您的计算机上，而不是在网站聊天机器人内。
03许可
行动前批准

blocks.html_en: Writing files, sending messages, and reaching outside services each need your explicit approval before Friday proceeds.

sentences.en: Writing files, sending messages, and reaching outside services each need your explicit approval before Friday proceeds.
sentences.zh: 在周五开始之前，编写文件、发送消息和联系外部服务都需要您的明确批准。
说和听

blocks.html_en: Dictate instead of typing, transcribe recordings, and have Friday read replies aloud in the voices you choose.

sentences.en: Dictate instead of typing, transcribe recordings, and have Friday read replies aloud in the voices you choose.
sentences.zh: 听写而不是打字，转录录音，并让星期五用您选择的声音大声朗读答复。
05可扩展
技能和 MCP

blocks.html_en: Teach Friday reusable workflows and expose new tools through the Model Context Protocol.

sentences.en: Teach Friday reusable workflows and expose new tools through the Model Context Protocol.
sentences.zh: 周五教授可重用工作流程并通过模型上下文协议公开新工具。
06自动化
时间表和检查

blocks.html_en: Run recurring jobs, daily summaries, and health checks on a schedule, even when you are not actively chatting.

sentences.en: Run recurring jobs, daily summaries, and health checks on a schedule, even when you are not actively chatting.
sentences.zh: 即使您没有积极聊天，也可以按计划运行重复作业、每日摘要和运行状况检查。
自然地提问。批准实际行动。
提出请求

blocks.html_en: Type or dictate what you want. Friday understands the goal, constraints, and expected output, then asks only when something critical is ambiguous.

sentences.en: Type or dictate what you want.
sentences.zh: 输入或口述您想要的内容。

sentences.en: Friday understands the goal, constraints, and expected output, then asks only when something critical is ambiguous.
sentences.zh: 星期五了解目标、约束和预期产出，然后仅在关键问题不明确时才提出询问。
挑选工具

blocks.html_en: It chooses the right files, commands, web search, browser, image generation, skill, MCP tool, subagent, or scheduled workflow for the task.

sentences.en: It chooses the right files, commands, web search, browser, image generation, skill, MCP tool, subagent, or scheduled workflow for the task.
sentences.zh: 它为任务选择正确的文件、命令、Web 搜索、浏览器、图像生成、技能、MCP 工具、子代理或计划的工作流程。
批准并验证

blocks.html_en: Sensitive actions pause for confirmation. Friday then checks the result and returns an answer, file, image, scheduled job, or other ready-to-use artifact.

sentences.zh: 敏感操作暂停以进行确认。

sentences.en: Friday then checks the result and returns an answer, file, image, scheduled job, or other ready-to-use artifact.
sentences.zh: 然后星期五检查结果并返回答案、文件、图像、计划作业或其他现成的工件。

blocks.html_en: Unlike a website chatbot, Friday runs on your machine and works through the providers, credentials, and permissions you choose.

sentences.en: Unlike a website chatbot, Friday runs on your machine and works through the providers, credentials, and permissions you choose.
sentences.zh: 与网站聊天机器人不同，Friday 在您的计算机上运行，​​并通过您选择的提供商、凭据和权限进行工作。
周五产品简介
使用 MCP 服务器延长周五时间。
扩展点
远程 MCP 服务器

blocks.html_en: Connect hosted tool servers over HTTP with optional token or key authentication, then make their tools available to the assistant.

sentences.en: Connect hosted tool servers over HTTP with optional token or key authentication, then make their tools available to the assistant.
sentences.zh: 使用可选的令牌或密钥身份验证通过 HTTP 连接托管工具服务器，然后将其工具提供给助手。
扩展点
本地 MCP 服务器

blocks.html_en: Run local stdio tool servers on your machine so domain-specific capabilities plug into Friday without changing the app.

sentences.en: Run local stdio tool servers on your machine so domain-specific capabilities plug into Friday without changing the app.
sentences.zh: 在您的计算机上运行本地 stdio 工具服务器，以便将特定于域的功能插入 Friday，而无需更改应用程序。
扩展点
任何 MCP 客户端工具

blocks.html_en: Expose new capabilities to the assistant through the open Model Context Protocol, the single supported way to extend Friday's tool surface.

sentences.en: Expose new capabilities to the assistant through the open Model Context Protocol, the single supported way to extend Friday's tool surface.
sentences.zh: 通过开放的模型上下文协议向助手展示新功能，这是扩展周五工具界面的唯一支持方式。
从任何地方与星期五聊天。

blocks.html_en: Connect a Telegram bot and chat with Friday from your phone or desktop, with access controls and replies delivered to the same conversation.

sentences.en: Connect a Telegram bot and chat with Friday from your phone or desktop, with access controls and replies delivered to the same conversation.
sentences.zh: 连接 Telegram 机器人并通过手机或桌面与 Friday 聊天，并提供对同一对话的访问控制和回复。

blocks.html_en: Bundled bot channel for phone or desktop chat, with allowlists, DM policy, targets, and replies through the same chat.

sentences.en: Bundled bot channel for phone or desktop chat, with allowlists, DM policy, targets, and replies through the same chat.
sentences.zh: 用于电话或桌面聊天的捆绑机器人通道，包含允许列表、DM 策略、目标和通过同一聊天进行回复。
你的聊天记录
星期五
同一线程
允许列表访问
私信政策
同线程回复

sentences.en: You decide who can reach Friday.
sentences.zh: 你决定谁能到达周五。

blocks.html_en: Each channel keeps its own credentials, enabled state, and access rules on your desktop.

sentences.en: Each channel keeps its own credentials, enabled state, and access rules on your desktop.
sentences.zh: 每个通道都在桌面上保留自己的凭据、启用状态和访问规则。
生成和自动化，按工作流程划分。
助手

blocks.html_en: The core runtime that plans, asks for approval, uses tools, and returns concrete results.

sentences.en: The core runtime that plans, asks for approval, uses tools, and returns concrete results.
sentences.zh: 计划、请求批准、使用工具并返回具体结果的核心运行时。
助理聊天

blocks.html_en: Run agent turns from a clean Markdown chat, with visible tool activity, session history, and permission prompts for sensitive actions.

sentences.en: Run agent turns from a clean Markdown chat, with visible tool activity, session history, and permission prompts for sensitive actions.
sentences.zh: 运行代理从干净的 Markdown 聊天转变为可见的工具活动、会话历史记录和敏感操作的权限提示。
一代

blocks.html_en: Separate media operators for voice, images, video, and audio so each capability can use its own provider and model.

sentences.en: Separate media operators for voice, images, video, and audio so each capability can use its own provider and model.
sentences.zh: 语音、图像、视频和音频的媒体运营商分开，因此每种功能都可以使用自己的提供商和模型。
语音生成

blocks.html_en: Dictate with speech-to-text and generate read-aloud replies through the voice provider and model you choose.

sentences.en: Dictate with speech-to-text and generate read-aloud replies through the voice provider and model you choose.
sentences.zh: 通过语音转文本进行听写，并通过您选择的语音提供商和模型生成朗读回复。
图像生成

blocks.html_en: Create images from text descriptions in chat or the image workspace using the provider and model you select.

sentences.en: Create images from text descriptions in chat or the image workspace using the provider and model you select.
sentences.zh: 使用您选择的提供商和模型，根据聊天或图像工作区中的文本描述创建图像。
视频生成

blocks.html_en: Generate video from text with the provider and model you choose. Results are playable and saved to your media library.

sentences.en: Generate video from text with the provider and model you choose.
sentences.zh: 使用您选择的提供商和模型从文本生成视频。

sentences.en: Results are playable and saved to your media library.
sentences.zh: 结果可以播放并保存到您的媒体库中。
音频生成

blocks.html_en: Generate music and sound effects from text through the audio provider and model you select.

sentences.en: Generate music and sound effects from text through the audio provider and model you select.
sentences.zh: 通过您选择的音频提供程序和模型从文本生成音乐和声音效果。
自动化

blocks.html_en: Background tools that run scheduled work and periodic checks without mixing them into media generation.

sentences.en: Background tools that run scheduled work and periodic checks without mixing them into media generation.
sentences.zh: 运行计划工作和定期检查的后台工具，无需将它们混合到媒体生成中。
计划任务

blocks.html_en: Create, update, pause, resume, list, and run recurring assistant jobs with their own instructions, provider, and model.

sentences.en: Create, update, pause, resume, list, and run recurring assistant jobs with their own instructions, provider, and model.
sentences.zh: 使用自己的指令、提供程序和模型创建、更新、暂停、恢复、列出和运行重复助理作业。
健康检查

blocks.html_en: Run periodic checklist-driven assistant checks and report back when something in your setup needs attention.

sentences.en: Run periodic checklist-driven assistant checks and report back when something in your setup needs attention.
sentences.zh: 定期运行检查表驱动的助理检查，并在您的设置中需要注意某些内容时进行报告。

blocks.html_en:
Bring your own AI.
Mix models by capability.

sentences.en: Bring your own AI.Mix models by capability.
sentences.zh: 按功能引入您自己的 AI.Mix 模型。
助手
OpenAIAnthropicGoogleMistralDeepSeekQwenOpenAI 兼容
语音转文本
文字转语音
OpenAIElevenLabsCartesia 提供商特定的声音
文本转图像
黑森林实验室GoogleIdeogramQwenStability AIxAI
文本转视频
谷歌 VeoKlingRunwayLumaMiniMaxPika
音乐/音频
ElevenLabs稳定性人工智能
文档
与产品相匹配的文档。
8 个文档页
6节
静态Astro 内容
产品
星期五是什么日子

blocks.html_en: Friday is a native desktop AI copilot that chats, acts with tools, and keeps control local.

sentences.en: Friday is a native desktop AI copilot that chats, acts with tools, and keeps control local.
sentences.zh: Friday 是一个本地桌面 AI 副驾驶，可以聊天、使用工具进行操作并保持本地控制。
产品
功能概述

blocks.html_en: The main Friday capabilities: chat, tools, voice, image, video, and audio generation, scheduling, health checks, memory, and personalization.

sentences.en: The main Friday capabilities: chat, tools, voice, image, video, and audio generation, scheduling, health checks, memory, and personalization.
sentences.zh: 周五的主要功能：聊天、工具、语音、图像、视频和音频生成、调度、健康检查、内存和个性化。
供应商
供应商

blocks.html_en: Friday is bring-your-own AI: add your own API keys and choose providers by capability.

sentences.en: Friday is bring-your-own AI: add your own API keys and choose providers by capability.
sentences.zh: 周五是自带 AI：添加您自己的 API 密钥并按功能选择提供商。
扩大
技能和MCP

blocks.html_en: Extend Friday with reusable skills and Model Context Protocol servers.

sentences.en: Extend Friday with reusable skills and Model Context Protocol servers.
sentences.zh: 使用可重用技能和模型上下文协议服务器来延长周五的时间。
渠道
渠道

blocks.html_en: Talk to Friday from Telegram and Discord today, with additional channel adapters coming soon.

sentences.en: Talk to Friday from Telegram and Discord today, with additional channel adapters coming soon.
sentences.zh: 今天通过 Telegram 和 Discord 与 Friday 进行对话，其他频道适配器即将推出。
隐私
隐私与安全

blocks.html_en: Friday is local-first, bring-your-own-key, and permissioned before sensitive actions.

sentences.en: Friday is local-first, bring-your-own-key, and permissioned before sensitive actions.
sentences.zh: 周五是本地优先，自带钥匙，并在敏感操作之前获得许可。
常见问题。

blocks.html_en: Friday is a native desktop AI copilot for everyday tasks. You chat with it in plain language and it can use tools to read and write files, search the web, generate images, transcribe voice, speak back, run scheduled work, and connect to external services.

sentences.en: Friday is a native desktop AI copilot for everyday tasks.
sentences.zh: Friday 是负责日常任务的原生桌面 AI 副驾驶。

sentences.en: You chat with it in plain language and it can use tools to read and write files, search the web, generate images, transcribe voice, speak back, run scheduled work, and connect to external services.
sentences.zh: 你用简单的语言与它聊天，它可以使用工具来读写文件、搜索网络、生成图像、转录语音、回复、运行计划的工作以及连接到外部服务。

blocks.html_en: Friday is local-first. Data leaves your machine only when a task requires an AI provider, channel, MCP server, web request, or hosted service you configured. Provider keys, credentials, settings, memory, and conversation history live locally.

sentences.zh: 周五是本地优先。

sentences.en: Data leaves your machine only when a task requires an AI provider, channel, MCP server, web request, or hosted service you configured.
sentences.zh: 仅当任务需要您配置的 AI 提供程序、通道、MCP 服务器、Web 请求或托管服务时，数据才会离开您的计算机。

sentences.en: Provider keys, credentials, settings, memory, and conversation history live locally.
sentences.zh: 提供者密钥、凭据、设置、内存和对话历史记录都位于本地。

blocks.html_en: No. Friday is bring-your-own-AI. Add your own provider keys and choose the provider and model for the assistant, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, image generation, video generation, and audio generation. OpenAI-compatible endpoints can be configured too.

sentences.zh: 不，周五是自带人工智能。

sentences.en: Add your own provider keys and choose the provider and model for the assistant, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, image generation, video generation, and audio generation.
sentences.zh: 添加您自己的提供商密钥，并为助手、语音转文本、文本转语音、图像生成、视频生成和音频生成选择提供商和模型。

sentences.en: OpenAI-compatible endpoints can be configured too.
sentences.zh: 也可以配置与 OpenAI 兼容的端点。

blocks.html_en: Actions that write, delete, publish, send messages, access private data, or touch accounts require explicit approval. Friday shows a confirmation prompt before sensitive work proceeds.

sentences.en: Actions that write, delete, publish, send messages, access private data, or touch accounts require explicit approval.
sentences.zh: 写入、删除、发布、发送消息、访问私人数据或触摸帐户的操作需要明确批准。

sentences.en: Friday shows a confirmation prompt before sensitive work proceeds.
sentences.zh: 周五在敏感工作继续进行之前会出现确认提示。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Connect a Telegram or Discord bot to talk to Friday from your phone or desktop, with per-channel access control, separate channel secrets, and replies delivered to the same conversation.

sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Connect a Telegram or Discord bot to talk to Friday from your phone or desktop, with per-channel access control, separate channel secrets, and replies delivered to the same conversation.
sentences.zh: 连接 Telegram 或 Discord 机器人，通过手机或桌面与 Friday 交谈，并提供每个频道的访问控制、单独的频道机密以及对同一对话的回复。

blocks.html_en: Use the scheduler for recurring assistant jobs such as daily summaries, routine checks, cleanup tasks, and reminders. Health checks can run periodically against a checklist and report only when attention is needed.

sentences.en: Use the scheduler for recurring assistant jobs such as daily summaries, routine checks, cleanup tasks, and reminders.
sentences.zh: 使用调度程序执行重复性助理工作，例如每日总结、例行检查、清理任务和提醒。

sentences.en: Health checks can run periodically against a checklist and report only when attention is needed.
sentences.zh: 可以根据清单定期运行运行状况检查，并仅在需要注意时才报告。

blocks.html_en: Friday is built with Electron for Windows, macOS on Intel and Apple Silicon, and Linux. The interface supports English and Italian, with light, dark, and system themes.

sentences.en: Friday is built with Electron for Windows, macOS on Intel and Apple Silicon, and Linux.
sentences.zh: Friday 是用 Electron 为 Windows、基于 Intel 和 Apple Silicon 的 macOS 以及 Linux 构建的。

sentences.en: The interface supports English and Italian, with light, dark, and system themes.
sentences.zh: 界面支持英语和意大利语，有浅色、深色和系统主题。

blocks.html_en: Friday does not currently claim a formal regulated-data certification. Review your own AI providers' and connected services' terms for how they handle data you send them.

sentences.en: Friday does not currently claim a formal regulated-data certification.
sentences.zh: Friday 目前尚未申请正式的监管数据认证。

sentences.en: Review your own AI providers' and connected services' terms for how they handle data you send them.
sentences.zh: 查看您自己的人工智能提供商和连接服务的条款，了解他们如何处理您发送给他们的数据。

content_html_zh:
v1.0/macOS / Windows / Linux/私人测试版

您的桌面人工智能副驾驶，负责日常任务。 用简单的语言聊天，Friday 可以读写文件、搜索网络、生成图像和视频、转录您的声音、回复、按计划运行以及连接到您已经使用的工具。

周五下载 GitHub 发行说明

适用于 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 的桌面测试版。

桌面应用程序在 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 上本机运行。

您的 AI 提供商连接您自己的提供商密钥并选择模型。

默认情况下本地设置、凭据、历史记录和内存保留在您的设备上。

你保持掌控周五敏感行动之前需要获得批准。

星期五

运行发布清单。

星期五

我会在进行更改之前检查该项目并询问。

检查我明天的日历。

星期五

您有三项活动：9:30 的站立会议、13:00 与 Marco 共进午餐以及 16:00 的设计评审。

§ 01 — Features

一个得力的助手，在您的桌面上运行。

01Chat

发挥作用的聊天

用简单的语言询问，星期五使用工具来完成工作——读取文件、起草文档、搜索网络、运行命令和生成图像。

02本地优先

本地和私人

Friday 是一个桌面应用程序。 您的密钥、设置、凭据、历史记录和文件保留在您的计算机上，而不是在网站聊天机器人内。

03许可

行动前批准

在周五开始之前，编写文件、发送消息和联系外部服务都需要您的明确批准。

04Voice

说和听

听写而不是打字，转录录音，并让星期五用您选择的声音大声朗读答复。

05可扩展

技能和 MCP

周五教授可重用工作流程并通过模型上下文协议公开新工具。

06自动化

时间表和检查

即使您没有积极聊天，也可以按计划运行重复作业、每日摘要和运行状况检查。

§ 02 — How it works

自然地提问。批准实际行动。

STEP 01

Ask

提出请求

输入或口述您想要的内容。 星期五了解目标、约束和预期产出，然后仅在关键问题不明确时才提出询问。

STEP 02

Plan

挑选工具

它为任务选择正确的文件、命令、Web 搜索、浏览器、图像生成、技能、MCP 工具、子代理或计划的工作流程。

STEP 03

Act

批准并验证

敏感操作暂停以进行确认。 然后星期五检查结果并返回答案、文件、图像、计划作业或其他现成的工件。

与网站聊天机器人不同，Friday 在您的计算机上运行，​​并通过您选择的提供商、凭据和权限进行工作。

周五产品简介

§ 03 — MCP

使用 MCP 服务器延长周五时间。

扩展点

远程 MCP 服务器

使用可选的令牌或密钥身份验证通过 HTTP 连接托管工具服务器，然后将其工具提供给助手。

扩展点

本地 MCP 服务器

在您的计算机上运行本地 stdio 工具服务器，以便将特定于域的功能插入 Friday，而无需更改应用程序。

扩展点

任何 MCP 客户端工具

通过开放的模型上下文协议向助手展示新功能，这是扩展周五工具界面的唯一支持方式。

§ 04 — 渠道

从任何地方与星期五聊天。

连接 Telegram 机器人并通过手机或桌面与 Friday 聊天，并提供对同一对话的访问控制和回复。

用于电话或桌面聊天的捆绑机器人通道，包含允许列表、DM 策略、目标和通过同一聊天进行回复。

你的聊天记录

§ 07 · FAQ

常见问题。

What is Friday?

Friday 是负责日常任务的原生桌面 AI 副驾驶。 你用简单的语言与它聊天，它可以使用工具来读写文件、搜索网络、生成图像、转录语音、回复、运行计划的工作以及连接到外部服务。

Does Friday send my data anywhere?

周五是本地优先。 仅当任务需要您配置的 AI 提供程序、通道、MCP 服务器、Web 请求或托管服务时，数据才会离开您的计算机。 提供者密钥、凭据、设置、内存和对话历史记录都位于本地。

Do I have to use one specific AI provider?

不，周五是自带人工智能。 添加您自己的提供商密钥，并为助手、语音转文本、文本转语音、图像生成、视频生成和音频生成选择提供商和模型。 也可以配置与 OpenAI 兼容的端点。

How does permissioning work?

写入、删除、发布、发送消息、访问私人数据或触摸帐户的操作需要明确批准。 周五在敏感工作继续进行之前会出现确认提示。

Can Friday work from outside the app?

是的。 连接 Telegram 或 Discord 机器人，通过手机或桌面与 Friday 交谈，并提供每个频道的访问控制、单独的频道机密以及对同一对话的回复。

What can be automated?

使用调度程序执行重复性助理工作，例如每日总结、例行检查、清理任务和提醒。 可以根据清单定期运行运行状况检查，并仅在需要注意时才报告。

Which desktop platforms are supported?

Friday 是用 Electron 为 Windows、基于 Intel 和 Apple Silicon 的 macOS 以及 Linux 构建的。 界面支持英语和意大利语，有浅色、深色和系统主题。

Is Friday certified for regulated data?

Friday 目前尚未申请正式的监管数据认证。 查看您自己的人工智能提供商和连接服务的条款，了解他们如何处理您发送给他们的数据。
